itemName.zh: HK G28 7.62x51 精确射手步枪 ☆
HK G28 7.62x51 精确射手步枪 ☆

description.zh: 你知道专家和业余爱好者的区别在哪里吗？以正确的方式达成目标的能力。举个例子，在不常见的情况下，在一个常人不能及的距离上做掉几个能干的战士……重要的不只是枪械和配件的选择，还有其他因素。就这样，我想看看你到底有多少能耐。
description.en: Do you know what is the difference between a professional and an amateur? It is the ability to approach the task from the right angle. For example, taking out a few capable fighters in non-standard situations... What's important here is not only the right weapons and mods but other factors too. So, Dima and I want to see who you really are.
